chapters.title: Before you start (ITR-4)
chapters.subtitle: Confirm ITR-4 fits you, and keep documents ready.
tips: ITR-4 is presumptive tax for small business (44AD) or professionals (44ADA).
Keep bank receipts summary, Form 16 (if salaried), AIS, and 26AS ready.
warnings: Capital gains or foreign income require ITR-2/3 — not ITR-4.
Cash receipts above 5% of turnover can disqualify presumptive scheme.

steps.title: Open the Income Tax portal
steps.plainEnglish: Open https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/ in a new tab. Keep LastMinute ITR open beside it.
steps.hindiShort: इनकम टैक्स पोर्टल नया टैब में खोलें।

steps.title: Check which ITR applies
steps.clickPath: Individual/HUF → Salaried Employees → Return / Forms applicable to me
steps.plainEnglish: Use this only if the portal (and LastMinute) say ITR-1. Otherwise switch the form selector above.
steps.hindiShort: पक्का करें कि आपका फॉर्म ITR-1 है।

steps.title: Documents checklist
steps.plainEnglish: Form 16 (employer), Form 26AS, AIS, bank statements, and investment proofs (policy / document numbers).

chapters.title: Login · 26AS · AIS
chapters.subtitle: Download what the tax department already knows, then match it.
tips: Select Assessment Year AY 2026-27 (next year after FY 2025-26).
Match salary, dividend, and savings interest with your Form 16 and bank.
warnings: If TDS on 26AS does not match Form 16, fix it before you file.

steps.title: Login (or register)
steps.plainEnglish: Sign in with PAN or Aadhaar. Register first if you do not have an account.
steps.hindiShort: PAN या आधार से लॉगिन करें।

steps.title: Open Form 26AS
steps.clickPath: e-File → Income Tax Returns → View Form 26AS
steps.plainEnglish: Click I Agree, then View Tax Credit (Form 26AS).

steps.title: Download 26AS for AY 2026-27
steps.clickPath: Assessment Year → AY 2026-27 → View as HTML → Export as PDF
steps.plainEnglish: Choose AY 2026-27, view as HTML, then export PDF. Check TDS lines carefully.
steps.tip: Your LastMinute TDS (when unlocked) should be close to Form 16 + 26AS.

steps.title: Download AIS / TIS
steps.plainEnglish: Download AIS for FY 2025-26. Match salary, dividend, and bank interest with your draft.
steps.hindiShort: AIS डाउनलोड कर के मिलान करें।

chapters.title: Start filing ITR-4
chapters.subtitle: Pick AY 2026-27, Online mode, and ITR-4.
tips: Mode of filing must be Online for this guide.
Choose Start New Filing unless you are revising an earlier draft.

steps.title: File Now
steps.clickPath: Dashboard left panel → check details → File Now
steps.plainEnglish: Confirm the details on the left. Update if wrong, then click File Now.

steps.title: Assessment year + Online
steps.clickPath: Assessment Year → AY 2026-27 → Mode of Filing → Online → Continue
steps.plainEnglish: Select AY 2026-27 and Online, then Continue.

steps.title: Start New Filing
steps.plainEnglish: Choose Start New Filing, then Individual, then Proceed.

steps.title: Select ITR-4
steps.clickPath: ITR-4 → Proceed With ITR-4 → Let's Get Started
steps.plainEnglish: Select ITR-4, Proceed With ITR-4, then Let's Get Started.

steps.title: Why you are filing
steps.clickPath: Taxable income is more than basic exemption limit → Continue
steps.plainEnglish: Select that taxable income is more than the basic exemption limit, then Continue.

chapters.title: Personal info · Regime · Bank
chapters.subtitle: Fix personal details, employment, old/new regime, and bank account.
chapters.portalPath: Personal Information → Nature of Employment → Regime → Bank
tips: Portal regime question: Yes = Old tax regime, No = New tax regime.
Filed u/s 139(1) if on time; 139(4) if after the due date.
warnings: If you are filing for yourself, answer No to the representative-assessee question.

steps.title: Personal Information
steps.clickPath: Select Personal Information → Edit if needed
steps.plainEnglish: Open Personal Information. Edit anything wrong, then save.

steps.title: Nature of employment + section
steps.clickPath: Nature of Employment → Others (private) → Filed u/s → 139(1) or 139(4)
steps.plainEnglish: Private employees usually pick Others. Use 139(1) before due date, or 139(4) if late.
steps.tip: LastMinute uses your late-filing flag to suggest 139(1) vs 139(4).

steps.title: Old vs new regime
steps.clickPath: Are you opting out of new regime? → Yes (Old) / No (New)
steps.plainEnglish: Yes means Old regime. No means New regime. Match the regime LastMinute recommended.
steps.hindiShort: Yes = पुराना, No = नया टैक्स स्लैब।

steps.title: Bank account
steps.clickPath: Add / link bank account → verify IFSC & account
steps.plainEnglish: Add and link a bank account if missing. Refunds go only to a validated account.

chapters.title: Presumptive income (44AD / 44ADA)
chapters.subtitle: Enter turnover or receipts — portal applies the flat rate.
tips: 44AD: 6% digital / 8% cash turnover for traders and small business.
warnings: Turnover above ₹2Cr (business) or receipts above ₹50L (profession) needs ITR-3.

steps.title: Open presumptive schedule
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Business & Profession → Presumptive
steps.plainEnglish: Open Schedule BP presumptive section.

steps.title: Turnover / gross receipts
steps.plainEnglish: Total receipts for the year — match bank summary.

steps.title: Presumptive income u/s 44AD
steps.plainEnglish: 6% or 8% of turnover — our computed business profit.

steps.title: Professional receipts (44ADA)
steps.plainEnglish: Gross professional receipts when you are a freelancer.

steps.title: Presumptive income u/s 44ADA
steps.plainEnglish: 50% of professional receipts.

steps.title: Net business income
steps.plainEnglish: Final business head — verify against our summary.

chapters.title: Goods carriage (44AE) — optional
chapters.subtitle: Only for truck/tempo owners. Skip for shop or freelance income.
tips: Cannot combine 44AD and 44AE for the same business.
warnings: LastMinute does not compute 44AE yet — use portal calculator or your CA.

steps.title: Add goods carriages
steps.plainEnglish: One row per truck/tempo owned during the year.

steps.title: Skip 44AE
steps.plainEnglish: Skip this chapter if you file under 44AD or 44ADA only.

chapters.title: Salary (if salaried + business)
chapters.subtitle: ITR-4 allows salary alongside presumptive business.
warnings: Do not skip salary when employer TDS appears in 26AS.

steps.title: Gross salary
steps.plainEnglish: From Form 16 when you also had employment income.

steps.title: Net salary
steps.plainEnglish: Verify net salary matches our figure.

chapters.title: Other sources (interest only)
chapters.subtitle: ITR-4 cannot report capital gains — switch to ITR-2 if you sold shares.
warnings: Capital gains require ITR-2 — ITR-4 is not valid for share/property sales.

steps.title: FD / savings interest
steps.plainEnglish: Interest income from AIS / bank statements.

steps.title: Total other sources
steps.plainEnglish: Verify total matches our summary.

chapters.title: Deductions · Tax paid
chapters.subtitle: Claim only deductions you can prove. Match TDS with Form 16 and 26AS.
tips: Many Chapter VI-A deductions work only in the old regime.
New regime still allows standard deduction and employer NPS (80CCD(2)) where eligible.

steps.title: Total Deductions
steps.clickPath: Total Deductions → enter eligible sections → Save
steps.plainEnglish: Open Total Deductions. Enter only amounts you have proof for (80C, 80D, etc.).

steps.title: Tax Paid (TDS)
steps.clickPath: Tax Paid → verify TDS / advance tax
steps.plainEnglish: Verify TDS with Form 16 and Form 26AS. Fix mismatches before you continue.

chapters.title: Tax liability · Confirm
chapters.subtitle: Check the computation once, then Confirm.
chapters.portalPath: Verify tax liability → D11 → Confirm → Proceed to Verification
tips: Under the new regime, resident individuals may get rebate up to ₹60,000 when total income is within ₹12 lakh (slab tax only) — this is an estimate tip, not a guarantee.

steps.title: Verify tax liability
steps.plainEnglish: Open the liability screen. Compare totals with LastMinute’s estimate.

steps.title: Check D11 and Confirm
steps.clickPath: D11. Total Tax, Fee and Interest → Confirm
steps.plainEnglish: Recheck D11 (D5+D7+D8+D9+D10+D10a−D6), then Confirm.

steps.title: Proceed to Verification
steps.plainEnglish: After all sections look right, click Proceed to Verification.

chapters.title: Pay / Refund · Preview · Submit
chapters.subtitle: Pay now or later if tax is due. Preview carefully, then submit.
warnings: If you Pay Now, wait until the challan appears in Tax Paid Schedule before you submit.

steps.title: Refund or pay
steps.clickPath: Refund path OR Pay Later / Pay Now
steps.plainEnglish: If refund: continue. If tax due: Pay Later or Pay Now. After Pay Now, confirm challan updated.

steps.title: Preview and submit
steps.clickPath: Preview And Submit Your Return → tick boxes → Proceed to Validation → Preview
steps.plainEnglish: Preview the return. Leave the three optional verification shortcuts if following Aadhaar OTP later. Proceed to Validation, then Preview again.

steps.title: Proceed to Verification
steps.clickPath: Proceed to Validation → Proceed To Verification
steps.plainEnglish: Re-check details, then Proceed to Verification.

chapters.title: E-verify · Download receipt
chapters.subtitle: Finish with Aadhaar OTP. Save your acknowledgement.
chapters.portalPath: E-Verify Now → Aadhaar OTP → Submit → Download Receipt
tips: We recommend Aadhaar OTP. E-verify within 30 days of filing.

steps.title: E-Verify Now
steps.plainEnglish: Choose E-Verify Now and Continue.

steps.title: Aadhaar OTP
steps.clickPath: OTP on mobile linked to Aadhaar → I agree → Generate OTP → Validate
steps.plainEnglish: Select Aadhaar OTP, agree, generate OTP, enter it, Validate, then Submit.

steps.title: Download receipt
steps.plainEnglish: Congratulations — download the receipt and paste the acknowledgement number in LastMinute Done.
